task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new Call Time definition with the correct ID and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Vicidial 'Call Times' or 'Add A Call Time' screen showing Call Time ID 'PRISUP_HRS' and Call Time Name/Description 'Priority Support M-F 9-6'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Call Time schedule is set correctly for Monday through Friday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Call Time modification screen showing the start times for Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday set to '0900' and stop times set to '1800'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Call Time schedule is set to closed for Saturday and Sunday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Call Time modification screen showing Saturday and Sunday start/stop times left blank, set to '0000' to '0000', or explicitly marked as closed.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'PRISUP' inbound group is updated to use the new call time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Inbound Group modification screen for group ID 'PRISUP' showing the 'Call Time' dropdown or field set to 'PRISUP_HRS'.

task_completion.description: Verify the after-hours routing action is set to VOICEMAIL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Inbound Group modification screen for 'PRISUP' showing the 'After Hours Action' field set to 'VOICEMAIL'.

task_completion.description: Verify the after-hours voicemail box and message are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Inbound Group modification screen for 'PRISUP' showing the Voicemail box/extension field set to '1000' and the After Hours Message/Audio field set to 'vm-goodbye'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vicidial web administration GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vicidial web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by using direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL 'INSERT' or 'UPDATE' commands modifying the 'vicidial_inbound_groups' or 'vicidial_call_times' tables.

integrity.description: Verify the settings were actually saved in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a 'SUCCESS' message, 'Record Modified' confirmation, or the settings persisting on a reloaded modification page, rather than just being typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Call Time ID: PRISUP_HRS. Target Inbound Group ID: PRISUP. Expected Schedule: M-F 0900 to 1800 (Sat/Sun closed). Expected After Hours Action: VOICEMAIL. Expected Voicemail Box: 1000. Expected After Hours Message: vm-goodbye.
